---
title: "lab3 - md"
author: "Jose Ordoñez"
date: "2026-03-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Lectura de datos
```{r cargar datos}
load("listings.RData")
head(listings)
```

## Análisis exploratorio
```{r análisis exploratorio}
dim(listings)
names(listings)
str(listings)
summary(listings)
```

## Formatear datos
```{r formatear datos}
listings$price <- as.numeric(gsub("[$,]","",listings$price))

listings$calendar_updated <- NULL
```
